75.reason: [Array index out of bounds: when j == count-1, zhi[j+1] accesses zhi[count], which is beyond the array size (300). This leads to undefined behavior.]

34.reason: [The second polynomial input loop may not execute because after the first loop, stdin might be at EOF or in an inconsistent state; also, using scanf with %c without skipping whitespace can leave newline in buffer causing premature break]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [The second polynomial input loop may not execute because after the first loop, stdin might be at EOF or in an inconsistent state; also, using scanf with %c without skipping whitespace can leave newline in buffer causing premature break]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  // The second polynomial input loop may not execute because the first loop consumes all input until EOF; after the first '\n', subsequent scanf may fail or block, and using !=EOF here is incorrect since the input ends with a newline, not EOF.
